productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Stanton Bitt Choc Suede Shoe
description: Talk about walking comfort in dress shoes, and there's no better brand that can offer it than rockport. If you want to experience this, then slip your feet into the Stanton oxfords. With a smooth perforated upper and a heavily padded insole with adiPRENE technology, the Stanton is a perfect footwear for those long hours at work.UpperFull grain leather upper with perforations for ample breathability to offer fresh, dry comfort Strategically placed leather and synthetic fabric overlays for enhanced support Padded collar and tongue with brand name embossed on the tongue for absolute comfort Perforated inner lining in leather for sweat absorption and comfortable all-day use Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit MidsoleEVA midsole for durability and to conform to the shape of the foot Padded footbed perforated at the heel and forefoot, with adiPRENE deep cushioning insole that offers a light, responsive ride, coupled with adiPRENE+ footbed pads for maximum shock absorption and forefoot cushioning for a resilient ride Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with an impact guidance line from the midfoot to the forefoot for added protection from impact Strategically grooved forefoot and heel for absolute grip on various surfaces curved medial midfoot for inner arch support Flex grooves in the forefoot for easy movement
